commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a44ac3435bdfac243daebddb8800df8d8f2d95b0)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds stacked Policy plugin tool-posture conformance code/tests/docs, policy reference-table docs, and a new agent-scoped policy overlay design note linked from the policy CLI page.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a runtime bug; this is a docs/design PR. The review finding is source-reproducible because the new design note contains `Sebby` while `docs/AGENTS.md` requires generic public docs.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/product review for the policy contract plus contributor action on docs wording and full-branch proof; this is not a safe automatic repair lane while the stack and protected label remain.

target.title: Docs: design agent-scoped policy overlays
target.body:
## Summary

Stacked on #85795. This docs-only design PR defines the intended agent-scoped policy overlay shape before we implement Sebby-style per-agent policy requirements.

The design keeps #85482 focused on broad tool posture conformance, keeps #85795 as the current field reference, and proposes `agents.byId.<agentId>` as the future home for stricter per-agent policy sections such as `workspace`, `tools`, `models`, and `mcp` when evidence can be attributed to a named agent.

## Verification

- `pnpm docs:list`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 docs/cli/policy.md docs/plan/policy-agent-scoped-overlays.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx docs/cli/policy.md docs/plan/policy-agent-scoped-overlays.md`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/cli/policy.md docs/plan/policy-agent-scoped-overlays.md`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Documentation-only design for future agent-scoped Policy plugin overlays layered on top of global policy rules.
Real environment tested: WSL checkout at `/root/src/openclaw-policy-agent-scoped-design` on Ubuntu-24.04.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran docs listing, Markdown formatting, MDX validation, and whitespace checks against the changed policy docs.
Evidence after fix: `docs/plan/policy-agent-scoped-overlays.md` now documents the proposed `agents.byId.<agentId>` shape, additive layering semantics, tool-vs-workspace boundary, section eligibility, and compatibility plan; `docs/cli/policy.md` links to it from the policy field reference.
Observed result after fix: Docs checks and formatting checks pass.
What was not tested: Runtime policy behavior; this PR intentionally changes documentation/design only and does not implement the proposed policy overlay.
target.author: giodl73-repo
